name: Bill's ABM Italian Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ingredients in the order listed into the bread machine pan.
2. Select the "Bread Rapid" or similar setting on your machine for reduced cooking time.
If necessary, adjust the water amount based on the consistency of your sourdough starter. The dough should form a ball and easily pull away from the sides of the pan during kneading.
